function R(e) {
    let {$t: t} = E();
    if (e.audience === `internal`)
        return {
            label: t({
                defaultMessage: `Internal`,
                id: `f59741002e`
            }),
            variant: `neutral`
        };
    if (e.is_default)
        return {
            label: t({
                defaultMessage: `Default`,
                id: `b27c7c5ec9`
            }),
            variant: `neutral`
        };
    if (e.subscription_tier === `max`)
        return {
            label: t({
                defaultMessage: `Max`,
                id: `c558546db1`
            }),
            variant: `neutral`
        };
    if (e.has_new_tag)
        return {
            label: t({
                defaultMessage: `New`,
                id: `80743709ad`
            }),
            variant: `info`
        }
}

}

function U({allowTextOnlyModels: e=!0}={}) {

function J(e, t) {
    return {
        selected: e === t.non_reasoning_model || e === t.reasoning_model,
        reasoning: e === t.reasoning_model
    }
}

N.memo)(function({selectedModels: e, onModelsChange: t, config: n, canSelectSearchModel: r, gateSearchModelSelection: i, restrictions: a, showHoverTooltips: o=!0, getDisabledByOrganization: s, onModelSelectionAttempt: c, maxModels: l=3, minModels: u=2}) {

function re(e) {
    return e != null
}
function $(e) {
    return e.audience === `internal`
}
var ie = (0,
N.memo)(function({showSeparator: e=!1, searchModelGateCallback: t, canSelectSearchModelCallback: n, restrictions: r, showHoverTooltips: i=!0, onModelSelectionAttempt: a, ...o}) {

      , {getConfigForSearchMode: c, getModelMode: l} = v({
        reason: s
    })
      , {disabledModelPreferences: u} = I({
        reason: s
    })
      , {variation: d} = P(!1)
      , {variation: f} = F(`no-mode-selection`)
      , p = d && f === ne

      , h = m ? o.models : void 0
      , _ = m ? void 0 : o.model
      , y = (0,
    N.useMemo)( () => {

            let e = new Set(h.map(l).filter(re))
              , t = Array.from(e);
            return t.length === 0 ? c(`search`) : t.flatMap(e => c(e))
        }
        return c(_ && l(_) || `search`)
    }
    , [c, l, m, _, h])
      , {gateSearchModelSelection: b} = A({
        openPaywallUpsell: g()
    })

    }

})
  , ae = ({selectedModel: e, onModelChange: t, onModelDeselect: n, config: r, canSelectSearchModel: i, gateSearchModelSelection: o, showSeparator: s=!1, restrictions: c, showHoverTooltips: l=!0, getDisabledByOrganization: u, showComputerEffortSwitchToggle: d=!1, onModelSelectionAttempt: f}) => {
    let {$t: m} = E()
      , {getModelMode: h} = v({
        reason: `search-model-menu-items-single`
    })
      , g = (0,
    N.useCallback)(r => {
        if (r === e && n) {
            n();
            return
        }
        let i = o(r);
        f?.({
            model: r,
            gated: i
        }),
        !i && t(r)
    }
    , [e, n, o, f, t])
      , _ = h(e)
      , {hasAccessToProFeatures: b} = p()
      , x = (0,
    N.useMemo)( () => r.find(t => t.non_reasoning_model === e || t.reasoning_model === e) ?? r[0], [r, e])
      , S = x?.reasoning_model === e
      , C = !!(d && _ === y.ASI && x)
      , T = C ? r.filter(e => !$(e)) : r
      , D = C ? r.filter(e => $(e)) : []
      , O = (0,
    N.useCallback)(t => {
        if (!x)
            return;
        let n = t ? x.reasoning_model ?? x.non_reasoning_model : x.non_reasoning_model ?? x.reasoning_model;
        !n || n === e || g(n)
    }
    , [g, x, e]);
    return (0,
    M.jsxs)(a.RadioGroup, {
        value: e,
        onValueChange: g,
        children: [(_ === y.SEARCH || _ === y.BROWSER_AGENT) && (b ? (0,
        M.jsx)(X, {
            selectedModel: e,

            onModelSelectionAttempt: f
        }) : (0,
        M.jsx)(te, {})), s && b && (0,
        M.jsx)(a.Separator, {}), T.map(t => (0,
        M.jsx)(q, {
            selection: J(e, t),
            modelConfig: t,
            onSelect: g,
            restrictions: c,
            showHoverTooltips: l,
            disabledByOrganization: u(t),
            menuItemType: `radio`,
            canSelectSearchModel: i,
            gateSearchModelSelection: o,
            onModelSelectionAttempt: f
        }, t.label)), C && x && (0,
        M.jsx)(V, {
            checked: S,
            modelConfig: x,
            onCheckedChange: O,
            requireModelVariants: !1,
            subtitle: m({
                defaultMessage: `Thinks harder, goes further on complex tasks`,
                id: `bad201a4a1`
            }),
            label: (0,
            M.jsx)(w, {
                defaultMessage: `High effort`,
                id: `23fb386db9`
            })
        }), D.length > 0 && (0,
        M.jsx)(a.Submenu, {
            triggerElement: (0,
            M.jsx)(a.SubmenuItem, {
                textValue: `Internal`,
                children: (0,
                M.jsx)(w, {
                    defaultMessage: `Internal`,
                    id: `aa4c0571d2`
                })
            }),
            children: D.map(t => (0,
            M.jsx)(q, {
                selection: J(e, t),
                modelConfig: t,
                onSelect: g,
                restrictions: c,
                showHoverTooltips: l,
                disabledByOrganization: u(t),
                menuItemType: `radio`,
                canSelectSearchModel: i,
                gateSearchModelSelection: o,
                onModelSelectionAttempt: f
            }, t.label))
        })]
    })
}
;
export {R as n, F as r, ie as t};
